holdings.infoBox: RSPS is an equity ETF with a total of 39 individual holdings. The top holdings are Monster Beverage stock at 3.32%, Casey's General Stores at 3.30%, Keurig Dr Pepper at 3.18%, Target at 3.15%, and Mondelez International at 3.15%.

overview.description: The Invesco S&P 500 Equal Weight Consumer Staples ETF (RSPS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in consumer staples equity. The fund tracks an equal-weighted index of large-cap US consumer staples stocks drawn from the S&P 500. RSPS was launched on Nov 1, 2006 and is issued by Invesco.
